title: FunTime Colored Talismans
description: Makes mascots on the FunTime server colored.
body:
****Attention! FunTime has disabled the display of talismans. No resource pack will be able to show it in the hand of another player!****

Requires Optyfine to work                                                                                 
1.If it doesn't work?                                                                               
You need to turn on special    items Settings/Gravics settings/Quality/Special                                                          items on                                                                                                                              
2.Does it work on lebimod?                                                                       
Yes it should                                                                                     
3.The Fabric is not working, what should I do?                                                                                             
Download mod SITResewn                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                           
Mascot colors:                                                                                                   
/krush: red                                                                                                        
/tritona: orange                                                                                                     
/dedala: yellow                                                                                                     
/karatel: purple                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
/Grani: light gray                                                                                                 
/harona: blue                                                                                                       
/Feniks: green                                                                                                                                                                                        
/garmonii: blue                                                                                                                                                                        
/ehidna: green-yellow
